Definition of a “clean girl” - I always thought it was the asthtic of fashion or beauty or being the minimalist life style.  I learned that practice healthy life style is included too!  I treasure my health, care very much on what I put in my body and how I move each day.  What I read, see, and who I surround myself with.  Because my energy is sacred and it’s not for everyone to take.  I am the definition of a clean girl. I am very proud of it.
